decision.summary: No new action: the April 24 daily board is finally live, but the nearest meaningful strikes still have unusably distorted asks, so there is no clean execution edge.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 77979.54, still near the upper part of the short-term range with shorts dominant and open interest flat to slightly softer, which leaves both a same-day dip and a same-day squeeze marginally plausible. But execution reality is still poor. The nearest daily downside candidates, 76k dip and 77k dip, both sit around 51-52% probability while asking roughly 0.98-0.99, which makes them unusable despite their model probabilities. The nearest upside candidates are no better: 78k reach trades around 67% with a 0.99 ask, and 79k reach around 50.5% with a 0.98 ask. Those books are too distorted to justify a conservative entry. The only live active thesis position remains the weekly 80k reach around 35.5%, while the old weekly 72k dip stays discarded_for_slot and does not require management. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone. The correct action is to wait for cleaner liquidity instead of forcing a daily entry into broken order books.
